creator: joseph@josephholsten.com
text:
I understand we have net/samba416, I’m specifically suggesting we change the Mk/bsd.default-versions.mk. I’m not clear how best to format this ticket so it’s routed to the right place.

 https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/tree/Mk/bsd.default-versions.mk#n149

I appreciate we want 4.19 from bug270383, but is it worth waiting? Feels like we want users to at least try the port before making it the default. But I don’t know the update standard for defaults.
